title: BEM-552 Telegram hourly scheduler fix
objective: Diagnose and fix missing hourly Telegram reports. Inspect .github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml, scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py, scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py, governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl, governance/transport/results.jsonl. Ensure curator-hourly-report.yml has allowed hourly schedule cron '0 * * * *', workflow_dispatch, valid YAML, Telegram sender steps using TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, picker and recorder calls, no issue #31. If workflow cannot guarantee immediate user-visible progress, add a ready_to_send BEM-552 Telegram status message and record exact diagnosis. Write governance/reports/bem552_telegram_hourly_scheduler_fix.md and proof. No issue comments.
